lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly maintained.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a strong finish, though you will find some minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches. Mechanically, it is reliable and runs smoothly, with no major leaks or mechanical issues to report. The interior is clean, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster consistent with its age. It is a dependable vehicle that is ready for its next owner.

Check out this dependable ride that's ready for its next chapter! This car has been a reliable companion and is in fair condition, showing some character and signs of use that come with its history. It’s a fantastic opportunity to own a functional, honest vehicle that still gets the job done every single day. If you’re looking for great value and a car with heart, this is the one for you!
The vehicle is in mint condition. There is no wear on the interior or exterior surfaces. All systems are fully functional. The vehicle is in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be road-worthy. The exterior shows substantial rust along the wheel wells and rocker panels, along with several large dents and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the upholstery is severely worn with multiple tears in the seating, and several interior components, including the air conditioning and radio, are currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine starts but exhibits a persistent knock, and the transmission suffers from noticeable slipping. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited for a dedicated project or as a donor vehicle for parts.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the discerning driver who values both performance and aesthetic integrity. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, it offers a seamless driving experience and a commanding presence on the road. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a well-preserved asset that balances sophisticated luxury with proven reliability. We invite serious inquiries to inspect this exceptional addition to our premium inventory.

Hi there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable car for me and is still in really solid shape. It drives beautifully and has been well-loved, so it's ready for many more adventures with you. I’m asking $29,900 for it – honestly, it’s a total steal for how well it runs! Come check it out!

Available is a meticulously maintained E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with high-pressure dual VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This driver-focused example utilizes the Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Key preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high torque loads. The chassis is dialed in with upgraded polyurethane bushings for sharpened turn-in and reduced deflection. The engine pulls linearly to its 8,000 RPM redline, benefiting from a recent valve adjustment. This is a mechanically honest vehicle delivering a pure, high-revving analog experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Minor interior wear. Priced for quick sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, solid condition throughout. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor, expected road wear that doesn't detract from its overall sharp appearance. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with well-preserved upholstery and all features functioning as intended. Mechanically, it drives smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of consistent oil changes and preventative service. From the responsive handling to the cold A/C, this car is ready for daily commutes or long weekend drives without hesitation. It strikes the perfect balance between value and quality for a discerning buyer.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it delivers reliable performance and a refined driving experience. The interior remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and sophisticated engineering of this premier selection.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both performance and reliability. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and aesthetic preservation. An exceptional value for those who demand excellence and longevity.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, so you can just hop in and go! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I’d love to see it go to a good home!

This driver-focused E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 inline-six, complete with individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings to maintain optimal suspension geometry under lateral load. With a documented valve adjustment and rod bearing service, this example offers robust mechanical integrity and the visceral performance engagement synonymous with the M-division’s golden era.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

Presented in a classic finish, this vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior is in commendable shape, showing only the expected minor stone chips from highway driving, while the alloy wheels remain free of major curbing. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows light, natural wear but no tears, and all power features—including the dual-zone climate control and navigation—operate as intended. Under the hood, the car has been treated to consistent synthetic oil changes and a recent comprehensive inspection, ensuring the drivetrain remains responsive and smooth. This is a dependable, well-documented car ready

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of durability and sophistication, it remains a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber pre-owned asset.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of sophisticated design and proven reliability. Maintained to rigorous standards, the automobile exhibits a refined aesthetic and robust mechanical health. It delivers a composed driving experience, reflecting a history of attentive ownership and consistent care. We invite you to experience the integrity and performance of this well-appointed unit.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive. It's been really well-taken care of and is still in great shape for its next adventure! It runs super smoothly and is perfect for anyone looking for a reliable, comfy car that’s ready to hit the road today. I’ve loved every mile in it, and I’m sure you will too. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically robust E92 M3 featuring the iconic S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving mill utilizes eight individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system for exceptional throttle response. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well. Minor interior wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and style. The exterior paint retains a beautiful luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and clean. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with premium upholstery that has been preserved remarkably well, alongside a suite of fully functional electronics and a dual-zone climate control system that blows ice-cold. Mechanically, the car is in great shape; it starts eagerly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and handles the road with precision. I have kept up with every scheduled service, including a recent oil change and brake inspection, so it is truly turn-key and ready for its next owner. This is a solid, honest car that has been driven with care and stored under cover.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. This unit has been curated for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliable performance and a sophisticated road presence. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, the vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains prepared for immediate, high-caliber service.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated presentation. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust performance standards, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with high-caliber ownership. The exterior retains a professional luster, while the interior remains well-appointed and preserved. A comprehensive assessment confirms its readiness for immediate service, making this an exemplary acquisition for those seeking reliability and value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's looking for a brand new adventure! This car has been super reliable and is still in great shape, perfect for someone who wants a solid, well-cared-for vehicle without the brand-new price tag. It drives like a dream and is totally ready to hit the road today. Come take a look—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically sound, the vehicle has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The factory limited-slip differential provides predictable lock-up, while the suspension geometry remains tight with upgraded polyurethane bushings. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the individual throttle bodies deliver immediate response, and the engine pulls cleanly to its 8,000 RPM redline. A mechanically dialed-in driver’s car optimized for technical B-roads.
Good condition. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver. Ready for inspection.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and style, perfect for a driver who values both performance and care. The exterior finish retains a deep, glossy luster, though minor, typical road peppering on the front fascia reflects its honest history on the highway. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather seating shows only light softening on the driver’s bolster, and all power features, including the ice-cold climate control and infotainment system, operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent idle, backed by a comprehensive service record that includes a recent fluid service and brake inspection. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the suspension remains tight and quiet over bumps. This is a solid, dependable car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. It exhibits robust mechanical integrity complemented by a refined aesthetic presentation. Every component has been evaluated to ensure consistent performance and operational excellence. Offering a harmonious balance of reliability and sophisticated engineering, this selection stands as a premier choice for those seeking quality and value in a pre-owned executive automobile.
